zh-TW.name: 鮪魚蛋餅
zh-TW.description: 附近早餐店的鮪魚蛋餅，加一杯無糖豆漿。

en-US.name: Tuna Egg Pancake
en-US.description: A tuna egg pancake from the nearby breakfast shop with unsweetened soy milk.

zh-TW.name: 鹹粥小菜
zh-TW.description: 溫熱鹹粥搭配滷蛋與青菜，適合想吃清爽早餐時。

en-US.name: Savory Rice Porridge
en-US.description: Warm savory rice porridge with a braised egg and greens for a lighter breakfast.

zh-TW.name: 花生厚片
zh-TW.description: 烤到邊緣酥脆的花生厚片，搭配熱紅茶。

en-US.name: Peanut Thick Toast
en-US.description: Crisp-edged thick toast with peanut spread and hot black tea.

zh-TW.name: 清燉牛肉麵
zh-TW.description: 湯頭清爽的牛肉麵，午餐想吃熱食時很穩定。

en-US.name: Clear Broth Beef Noodle Soup
en-US.description: A steady hot lunch with clear broth, beef, and noodles.

zh-TW.name: 雞腿便當
zh-TW.description: 烤雞腿便當搭配三樣配菜，適合需要吃飽的中午。

en-US.name: Chicken Leg Bento
en-US.description: Roasted chicken leg bento with three sides for a filling lunch.

zh-TW.name: 番茄義大利麵
zh-TW.description: 酸甜番茄醬汁與蔬菜，適合想換口味的午餐。

en-US.name: Tomato Pasta
en-US.description: Sweet-tart tomato sauce and vegetables when lunch needs a change of pace.

zh-TW.name: 壽喜燒鍋
zh-TW.description: 晚餐吃暖鍋，搭配青菜、豆腐與薄切牛肉。

en-US.name: Sukiyaki Hot Pot
en-US.description: A warm dinner pot with greens, tofu, and thinly sliced beef.

zh-TW.name: 蒜香雞肉飯
zh-TW.description: 蒜香煎雞腿配白飯與燙青菜，晚餐簡單但有份量。

en-US.name: Garlic Chicken Rice
en-US.description: Garlic pan-seared chicken with rice and blanched greens for a simple dinner.

zh-TW.name: 蔬菜咖哩
zh-TW.description: 馬鈴薯、紅蘿蔔與菇類的蔬菜咖哩，適合不想吃太油時。

en-US.name: Vegetable Curry
en-US.description: A lighter curry with potatoes, carrots, and mushrooms.
